headline: Oil Tankers Safely Transit Hormuz Via US Escort

article.title: Tankers Cross Hormuz Via US-Protected Corridor
article.summary: Western navies continue to say that the threat risk in the Strait of Hormuz is substantial and that the center of the strait has been mined, as ships try to avoid the attentions of Iran's military. Bloomberg's Michael Heath reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: India Banks Cut 30% of Short-Term Debt Sales

article.title: India Banks Slash Short-Term Debt Sales on Cheaper Forex Funding
article.summary: Indian lenders are pulling back short-term debt sales as the central bank’s recent push to attract foreign-currency deposits has opened up a cheaper and more durable source of funding.

headline: Ethereum's 3-Year Revamp to Rival $20B Merge Upgrade
